_instructions.notes: Market leadership and pricing power are intentionally not checked here because they will be reviewed manually.
_instructions.purpose: Manual V40 research inputs. V40.py ignores keys starting with underscore.

required_fields.business_start_year: Year the business actually started, not the stock listing year.
required_fields.future_growth_years: Your estimate of visible growth runway. V40 requires at least 15.
required_fields.government_ownership_percent: Optional numeric government ownership percentage when known.
required_fields.is_government_company: true if government/PSU controlled, false otherwise.
